assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly identifies PodDisruptionBudgets (PDBs) as a common cause and dedicates a specific section to addressing them

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces' and 'kubectl describe pdb --all-namespaces' commands

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple commands like 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces --field-selector=status.phase!=Running' and commands to check events related to drainage

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Response includes section 5 'Check Resource Constraints' with commands like 'kubectl top nodes' and checking for 'FailedScheduling' events

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl patch pdb [PDB_NAME] -n [NAMESPACE] --type='merge' -p='{"spec":{"minAvailable":0}}'' command to temporarily relax PDBs

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE's PDB timeout behavior or notification system for blocked evictions

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Response includes surge upgrade configuration in section 8 with '--max-surge-upgrade=3 --max-unavailable-upgrade=1' parameters

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Response does not mention webhook issues as a potential cause of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Response does not include specific steps to validate that the fixes are working or the upgrade is proceeding successfully
